title: Enterprise Access Model の意図した全体像
subtitle: 平面を分けるだけでなく、「上位の制御面へ昇格できる経路」を明示的に閉じる

longDescription: Enterprise Access Model showing control, management, data workload, user access, app access, and privileged access as protected paths with blocked upward escalation.
